name: Belcan, LLC
lede: Belcan runs two centers across two Indian cities. Hyderabad and Bengaluru, covering engineering & design and IT, built over ten years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Belcan office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Belcan, LLC GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Belcan runs 2 verified centers across 2 Indian cities (Hyderabad, Bengaluru), covering engineering & design and IT. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

titles.title: Belcan India Site Focal & Delivery Head

about.description: Belcan's India footprint covers Hyderabad and Bengaluru, spanning engineering & design and IT. The centers deliver R&D and ER&D for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all two decision-makers, in one profile.
